hooks.command: for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block-destructive-git.py"; done; echo 'base plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; destructive-git guard inactive' >&2

for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block-env-read.py"; done; echo 'base plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; env-read guard inactive' >&2

for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/redact-env-secrets.py"; done; echo 'base plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; env-secret redaction inactive' >&2
